title: pterocarpus longifolius
intro: Pterocarpus longifolius, also known as the Odum tree or Burmese rosewood, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pterocarpus longifolius include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
